name: Fast and Fit Clam Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Diced bell peppers (red and/or green)
2 cans Chopped clams in clam juice (6 1/2 ounces each)
2 lb (6 medium) Potatoes, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
10 oz Frozen whole kernel corn, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place butter in a 2 1/2- to 3-quart microwave-safe bowl. Microwave on HIGH for 1 minute.
2. Add leeks and bell peppers; microwave on HIGH for 3 minutes.
3. Drain juice from clams into the microwaved vegetables, reserving the clams.
4. Stir in potatoes, broth, and thyme. Cover with plastic wrap, venting one corner. Microwave on HIGH for 20 minutes.
5. With a slotted spoon, remove 4 cups of cooked potatoes; set aside.
6. Pour contents of bowl into an electric blender; add milk. Hold the lid down tightly and blend until smooth.
7. Return mixture to the bowl. Stir in reserved clams, potatoes, corn, and cayenne; season with salt and pepper.
8. Microwave on HIGH for 3 minutes until heated through. If desired, pass bowls of shredded Cheddar cheese, chopped parsley, and/or crumbled cooked bacon to stir into soup.
NOTE: Microwave cooking times are based on a 700-watt microwave. Adjust cooking times to your own oven.
